features: Strong car fragrance spray – High 6% fragrance for noticeable strength that refreshes the cabin fast.
Car air freshener that lasts – Quick-dry, non-aerosol mist designed for fabric mats/footwells; no heavy residue when used as directed.
Clear, reliable formula – Built with premium solubiliser for crystal clarity and consistent spray performance.
Easy to use – Shake and spray 2–4 light mists from 20–30 cm; adjust to preference.
UK brand | Gift-ready – Developed by OG Auto Care for daily drivers and enthusiasts.
description: Upgrade your drive with OG Auto Care Savage—a car fragrance spray engineered for impact and ease. The performance base delivers a bold, long-lasting car air freshener effect with a clean, quick-dry mist. Spray lightly into the cabin or onto fabric floor mats/boot liner and enjoy a fresher journey every time. How to use: Shake gently. Spray 2–4 light mists into the air or onto fabric mats from 20–30 cm. Allow to dry; reapply as desired. Care: Do not spray dashboards, touchscreens, glass, steering wheel, pedals, leather or suede/Alcantara. Wipe any overspray immediately. What’s inside: Water, denatured perfumers alcohol, fragrance, Polysorbate 20, phenoxyethanol, ethylhexylglycerin. Designed in the UK by OG Auto Care.
